text: MINUTES OF WESTERN BAY OF PLENTY DISTRICT COUNCIL

That the apology for absence from Cr M Gray, Cr A Henry and Cr K Marsh be accepted.

9.1 APPOINTMENT OF TRUSTEE TO THE BOARD OF TOURISM BAY OF PLENTY 2021
That the report from the Community Manager dated 27 April 2021 titled ‘Appointment of 1.
Trustee to the Board of Tourism Bay of Plenty 2021’ be received.
2. That the report relates to an issue that is considered to be of low significance in terms of
3. That Council approves the appointment of Jason Hill as Trustee to the Tourism Bay of Plenty
Board for a further three years to 30 April 2024, subject to approval by Tauranga City Council
as joint shareholder at their meeting on 27 April 2021.
4. That the recommendation be transferred to the Open section of the meeting on 27 April 2021.
